name: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole
original_name: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole
overview: The individual stories of previously convicted child offenders sentenced to mandatory life terms, without parole, who are now seeking resentencing on the heels of a recent United States Supreme Court ruling. While some may be resentenced to life, others could be immediately released or given a new sentence that makes them eligible for parole.

trailers.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole | Tuesdays beginning on April 30th at 10/9c | A&E
